description: Each timepiece from giordano has an elegant, contemporary look and advanced Japanese movements, seamlessly blended with classic, timeless designs. A watch designed for modern life but remaining true to its heritage. Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 8 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 1 Year Stainless steel case for durability, style and comfort Black leather strap with a tang clasp and stitch detailing Black dial with three chronograph displays Screw to reset time Solid case back for enhanced durability Branding at the 12 hour mark Water resistance up to 100 meters, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing.Warranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
